enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $10.98B — petrochemicals, PVC/chlor-alkali, and building products. Sub-sector corrected from Downstream Refining to Petrochemical & Specialty Chemicals (denominator = Revenue). ~16,000 employees. Houston HQ in STOLA — clean account. No CIO, CDO, or AI programs identified. No MSP or CoE. No MS standardization confirmed. Closely held family-controlled company (Chao family ~70% ownership) — conservative IT spending culture likely. WWT opportunity: Houston STOLA account, no MSP displacement, but limited IT leadership visibility and family-controlled structure reduces near-term engagement probability.
